title: Hospital Management Module – Phase 1: Hospital CRUD + Phlebotomist Assignment

requirements.text: Add a Hospital data model to the backend with fields: id (auto-generated), name (required), city, address, area/zone, contactNumber, isActive (default true), createdAt timestamp. Store hospitals in a stable HashMap in the main actor.
acceptanceCriteria: Hospital record is persisted across canister upgrades via stable storage.
All required fields are validated — name must be non-empty.
Each hospital receives a unique auto-generated ID.

requirements.text: Expose backend endpoints: addHospital, updateHospital, disableHospital (sets isActive=false, does not delete), getHospitals (returns paginated list with optional search filter on name/city/area), getHospitalById. Disabling a hospital that has phlebotomist assignments must still be allowed — only deletion is blocked.

quotes: Do not delete hospitals if assigned — only allow disable.

acceptanceCriteria: addHospital is callable only by superAdmin role.
updateHospital is callable only by superAdmin role.
disableHospital sets isActive=false and is callable only by superAdmin.
getHospitals supports pagination (page size 20) and optional search term filtering name, city, and area fields.
No hospital record is ever deleted from storage.

requirements.text: Add a many-to-many HospitalPhlebotomistAssignment model in the backend: store a stable list/map of (hospitalId, phlebotomistPrincipal) pairs. Expose endpoints: assignPhlebotomistToHospital, removePhlebotomistFromHospital, getPhlebotomistsByHospital, getHospitalsByPhlebotomist. Assignment history must never be deleted — use a soft-removal flag instead.

quotes: A phlebotomist can be assigned to multiple hospitals.
A hospital can have multiple phlebotomists.

acceptanceCriteria: assignPhlebotomistToHospital and removePhlebotomistFromHospital are callable only by superAdmin.
getPhlebotomistsByHospital returns all active assignments for a given hospital.
getHospitalsByPhlebotomist returns all active assigned hospitals for a given phlebotomist principal.
Removed assignments are marked inactive, not deleted.

requirements.text: Add an 'area' field to the UserProfile/phlebotomist model in the backend so phlebotomists can have an area/zone. When getPhlebotomistsByHospital is called, include each phlebotomist's area in the response so the frontend can compute area-match suggestions.

quotes: Add 'Area / Zone' field in: Hospital, Phlebotomist profile

acceptanceCriteria: Phlebotomist UserProfile includes an optional area/zone field.
getPhlebotomistsByHospital response includes phlebotomist area.
Existing phlebotomist records without area default to empty string without migration errors.

requirements.text: Block adding new hospital samples for an inactive hospital. In the addHospitalSample backend endpoint, validate that the selected hospital's isActive flag is true before accepting the submission; return an error if inactive.

quotes: If hospital is inactive → phlebotomist cannot add new samples for it.

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting a sample for an inactive hospital returns a descriptive error.
Active hospitals continue to accept samples normally.

requirements.text: Add a 'Hospital Management' section under the Super Admin navigation in StaffApp. Create a HospitalManagementPage listing all hospitals with: name, city, area, contact, Active/Inactive status badge, Edit and Disable action buttons, search bar (name/city/area), and pagination (20 per page). Show 'No hospitals added yet.' when the list is empty.

quotes: If no hospitals exist, show: 'No hospitals added yet.'

acceptanceCriteria: HospitalManagementPage is accessible only to superAdmin role (guarded by RoleGuard).
Hospitals list is paginated at 20 per page with next/previous controls.
Search input filters visible results by name, city, or area in real time.
Each row shows an Active/Inactive status badge.
Empty state message 'No hospitals added yet.' is shown when no hospitals exist.
Disable button triggers a confirmation dialog before calling disableHospital.

requirements.text: Create an Add Hospital modal/form (triggered from HospitalManagementPage) with fields: Hospital Name (required), City, Address, Area/Zone, Contact Number, and Active/Inactive toggle. On save, call the addHospital backend mutation and refresh the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Hospital Name field shows a validation error if submitted empty.
Form calls addHospital mutation on submit and shows a success toast on completion.
Modal closes and list refreshes after successful creation.

requirements.text: Create an Edit Hospital modal pre-populated with existing hospital data. Allow editing all fields (name, city, address, area/zone, contact, active toggle). On save, call the updateHospital backend mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing field values are pre-filled when the edit modal opens.
Saving calls updateHospital and shows a success toast.
Only superAdmin can see the Edit button.

requirements.text: Create a Hospital Details page (navigable from HospitalManagementPage) that includes an 'Assigned Phlebotomists' section. The section lists currently assigned phlebotomists with their name and area. Super Admin sees an 'Assign Phlebotomist' button that opens a multi-select dropdown (with search) of available phlebotomists. Saving the selection calls assignPhlebotomistToHospital for each newly selected phlebotomist. Show area-match suggestion text (e.g., 'Same area as hospital') next to phlebotomists whose area matches the hospital's area — do not auto-assign.

quotes: If hospital area matches phlebotomist area, show suggestion for assignment.

acceptanceCriteria: Assigned phlebotomists list is shown with name and area.
Assign Phlebotomist button is visible only to superAdmin.
Multi-select dropdown supports text search to filter phlebotomists.
Area-match suggestion label appears next to phlebotomists sharing the hospital's area.
Saving assignment calls assignPhlebotomistToHospital and refreshes the list.
If no phlebotomists exist, show an appropriate empty state.

requirements.text: Add an 'Assigned Hospitals' section to the Phlebotomist Profile page (visible in the staff app). For Super Admin, show add/remove controls to assign or unassign hospitals. For phlebotomists, show the list of assigned hospitals in read-only mode. For Lab Admin, show the assigned hospitals list read-only.

quotes: Add in Phlebotomist Profile page: Section: 'Assigned Hospitals'
Allow Super Admin to add/remove hospitals.
Phlebotomist: Can only see hospitals assigned to them.
Lab Admin: Can view assigned hospitals only.

acceptanceCriteria: Phlebotomist profile page shows an 'Assigned Hospitals' section.
SuperAdmin sees add and remove controls for each assigned hospital entry.
Phlebotomist and Lab Admin roles see the section as read-only.
Removing a hospital calls removePhlebotomistFromHospital and updates the list.

requirements.text: On the AddHospitalSamplePage, filter the hospital selection list to only show hospitals that are active AND assigned to the currently logged-in phlebotomist. If an inactive hospital is somehow selected, show an error message preventing submission.

quotes: If hospital is inactive → phlebotomist cannot add new samples for it.
Phlebotomist: Can only see hospitals assigned to them.

acceptanceCriteria: Hospital dropdown on AddHospitalSamplePage only shows active hospitals assigned to the current phlebotomist.
If no hospitals are assigned, show a clear empty state message.

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in useQueries.ts for all new hospital endpoints: useHospitals (paginated + search), useHospitalById, useAddHospital, useUpdateHospital, useDisableHospital, useAssignPhlebotomistToHospital, useRemovePhlebotomistFromHospital, useGetPhlebotomistsByHospital, useGetHospitalsByPhlebotomist.
acceptanceCriteria: All mutation hooks invalidate the relevant hospital and assignment query caches on success.
useHospitals accepts page and searchTerm parameters.
Hooks follow the existing pattern in useQueries.ts.

constraints: Do not break existing sample workflow (HospitalSample, Booking, HomeCollection logic must remain intact).
Do not delete demo data or existing seed data.
Hospital records must never be hard-deleted — soft disable only.
Assignment history must never be deleted — use inactive flag.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, useInternetIdentity.ts, main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Auto-assignment of phlebotomists based on area matching — suggestion display only.
Email or SMS notifications for hospital assignments.
Patient-facing hospital selection UI changes beyond AddHospitalSamplePage filtering.
Any changes to the patient app portal.
